description: Localiza is a Brazilian mobility company focused on vehicle rental and related fleet/mobility services. Its public web properties include a developer portal for partner APIs and an AI-oriented MCP endpoint.
summary: Localiza exposes a developer HTTP API portal authenticated with app headers (`client_id` + `access_token`), plus a public MCP endpoint at `https://api-hub.localiza.com/genaichatapp-mcp/v1/mcp`.
